══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Human — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Human — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Human — Winged Striker HP: 52/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Human — Winged Striker HP: 33/67
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Human — Winged Striker HP: 16/67
--- Human — Winged Striker --- HP: 16/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (16/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Human — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Human — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Human — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Human — Winged Striker HP: -1/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
